title: NHM Kannur Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Midlevel Service Provider Posts
description: National Health Mission Kannur (NHM Kannur) has declared the offcial notification for the post of various Midlevel Service Provider Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc Nursing, GNM can usethis chance and apply for the NHM Kannur Recruitment 2026 . Interested candidates can attend the walk-in at the given venue. Here we mentioned more about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, and more details. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2...
